en-US.description:
Sunclub helps you keep a daily sunscreen habit without accounts, feeds, or extra setup.

Point your camera at a sunscreen bottle when you want AI verification, or log today manually when you already applied. Sunclub keeps your streak, shows your recent check-ins, and reminds you when it is time to apply again.

Camera verification uses FastVLM, an on-device vision model hosted as a one-time App Store download. After the model finishes downloading, verification stays available offline on that iPhone.

Features:

• Camera Verification — Confirm a sunscreen bottle with on-device AI.
• Manual Logging — Record today even when the bottle is not nearby.
• Streak Tracking — Keep your current streak and personal best in view.
• Weekly Summary — Review the last 7 days at a glance.
• Reapply Reminders — Set daily and reapply reminders that open straight into Sunclub.
• Private by Default — No accounts, no cloud sync, and no analytics SDKs.

Sunclub is built for people who want sun protection to be a routine instead of another task to remember.
en-US.promotional_text: Build a steady sunscreen routine with camera verification, manual logging, streaks, and reminders.
en-US.whats_new: Initial release. Verify sunscreen with the camera after a one-time model download, log manually when needed, and keep your streak on track.

review.demo_account_notes: No account required. All user data stays on device.
review.notes: Sunclub requests camera access only for sunscreen verification. Reviewers can test manual logging from Home without downloading the model. To test camera verification, open Verify Now, approve the one-time FastVLM download, then point the camera at a sunscreen bottle or tube until the app confirms detection.

privacy.camera_usage_description: Camera access is used to verify that sunscreen is present before Sunclub logs today.
privacy.notifications_usage_description: Notifications remind the user to apply or reapply sunscreen.

export_compliance.content_rights_note: This app does not contain, show, or access third-party content.

manual_steps: Replace draft support, marketing, and privacy URLs with live pages and mark them ready.
Replace the draft App Review contact details and mark them ready.
Answer App Privacy and export compliance questions in App Store Connect to match this manifest.
Upload the generated 6.9-inch iPhone screenshots in App Store Connect.
